h2.span: Overall issues and pull requests status

section.div: "That's one small step for man, one giant leap for mankind."

div.p: My name is Talha. I am a wholehearted believer in open-source projects.

I started software engineering when I was 15, and it quickly became my unwavering passion. I vividly recall those days when I would put aside my homework to immerse myself in coding, working on all sorts of fun and, admittedly, sometimes silly projects. As time passed, my enthusiasm for software engineering only grew, leading me down the path of becoming an open-source enthusiast.
div.h2: A few highlights of my job:

ul.li: NightBase - Nightbase is DBaaS on steroids

div.p: If you take a peek at my profile, you'll notice that I don't have an extensive list of open-source projects to my name. This isn't due to a lack of dedication or love for the open-source community, but rather a result of my commitment to quality over quantity. I believe in crafting meaningful contributions that have a lasting impact. So, while my project count may be modest, each one represents a labor of love and a desire to make a real difference in the world of open source

ul.li: To make NightBase totally free for everyone

div.p: I look forward to continuing my journey as an open-source believer, contributing to projects that resonate with my values and bring positive change to the software development landscape.
